growth_records.strain: Negev Desert biological soil crust, Israel (uncultured in situ community)
growth_records.medium: Native desert biocrust soil hydrated with simulated rain (30% v/v 2H2O heavy water)

sec.method: reported; measured CO2 release from hydrated biocrust (whole-community, per g soil, not per gDW). Dry-state respiration 0.61 ng C/g/h

growth_records.cite: Imminger et al. Survival and rapid resuscitation permit limited productivity in desert microbial communities. Nature Communications (2024). DOI:10.1038/s41467-024-46920-6. [PMC11519504]
growth_records.snippet: calculating replication times for a heterotrophic metabolism yielded a median doubling time of 5.6 days, ranging from as short as 7 h to as long as 147 days ... High respiration rates after hydration were confirmed by measuring CO2 release
growth_records.notes: Growth measured as single-cell 2H incorporation from 30% 2H2O over 24 h, converted to specific growth rate mu and cellular replication (doubling) time. Reported median doubling time under a heterotrophic-metabolism assumption = 5.6 days. Converted: td = 5.6 d x 24 = 134.4 h; mu = ln2/td = 0.693147/134.4 = 0.00516 /h. Reported range 7 h to 147 days (mu 0.0000196-0.099 /h). CO2 secretion is a whole-community rate per gram soil (3720 ng C/g/h hydrated vs 0.61 ng C/g/h dry); cannot be converted to mmol/gDW/h because biomass basis not given. No defined medium composition (native soil hydrated with heavy water). Not a single strain; mixed in situ community.

growth_records.strain: Negev Desert biological soil crust, Israel (uncultured in situ community)
growth_records.medium: Native desert biocrust soil hydrated with simulated rain (30% v/v 2H2O heavy water)
growth_records.cite: Imminger et al. Survival and rapid resuscitation permit limited productivity in desert microbial communities. Nature Communications (2024). DOI:10.1038/s41467-024-46920-6. [PMC11519504]
growth_records.snippet: When assuming a chemoautotrophic metabolism, the median doubling time increased to 18.7 days, with a minimum of 2.1 days and a maximum of 471 days.
growth_records.notes: Same physical condition as the heterotrophic record but replication times recomputed assuming chemoautotrophic (CO2-fixing) metabolism. Reported median doubling time = 18.7 days. Converted: td = 18.7 d x 24 = 448.8 h; mu = ln2/td = 0.693147/448.8 = 0.001545 /h. Reported range 2.1-471 days (mu 0.0000613-0.01375 /h). No defined medium; mixed in situ community; single-cell 2H2O/NanoSIMS.
